questions.scenario: A template task notifies `Reload nginx`. A later task immediately checks the new Nginx route. Without extra steps, when will the handler normally run?

options.text: At the handler point near the end of the play, after normal tasks finish.
Before the next task, because handlers always run immediately.
Only on the next playbook run.
Never, because template tasks cannot notify handlers.

questions.explanation: Handlers normally run after the normal task list for the play. Use `meta: flush_handlers` only when later tasks truly need the change active earlier.
